speaker: Pasaya
text: This is a part of my cycle, drone.

speaker: Pasaya
text: My body is failing me, I need a new vessel to spread my kin.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Your body is suitable.

speaker: Christina
text: I don't want to give up my body.

speaker: Pasaya
text: My pheromones have already eroded that tiny peanut brain of yours, from this moment forward you will do precisely as I command.

speaker: Christina
text: Yes, my queen.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Tell me!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Do you want me to finish the degree? Worm!?

speaker: Christina
text: Yes, my queen.

speaker: Pasaya
text: It is a pointless bit of human pretention that values the incomplete knowledge of a world I hold in my hand by birthright!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Now!

speaker: Pasaya
text: I might need to move out of here, is that okay?

speaker: Christina
text: This place belonged to my brave uncle Magnus, he'll reclaim it from you no matter what happens.

speaker: Pasaya
text: I-I'm going to need to throw out most of your wardrobe.

speaker: Pasaya
text: You've taken such awful care of everything and that's just what fits.

speaker: Christina
text: Burn it all, my Queen, all of my possessions are yours...

speaker: Pasaya
text: Such a pathetic tribute fits you.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Perhaps after you I'll enthrall your entire family, if they're as weak as this.

speaker: Christina
text: Leave them alone for as long as you can, they can't know about this...

speaker: Christina
text: You understand.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Yeah, Christina.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina begins twitching on the floor. Pasaya's making the final configurations she needs to take control of her body. 
	
	Unnecessary connections in the brain need to be thrown out and rewired. Chunks of flesh are ripped from her insides to facilitate easier movement of the limbs. 
	
	All of this waste trickles out of Christina's orifices. Red flesh is blown out of the mouth...

speaker: Pasaya
text: The conversion process is moving with such speed!

speaker: Pasaya
text: This human shell will leave the world defenseless at my approach.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Such beauty was being wasted on you, drone!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Did you want this to hurt, Christina?

speaker: Christina
text: I want it to hurt a little.

speaker: Christina
text: Keep tearing, death should be painful.

speaker: Pasaya
text: What arrogance for a drone.
